entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: An important legume crop grown mainly in the semi-arid tropics of Asia, Africa, Latin America, and the Caribbean.

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A region where pigeonpea is grown.

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A region where pigeonpea is grown and exported from.

entities.name: LATIN AMERICA
entities.description: A region where pigeonpea is grown.

entities.name: CARIBBEAN
entities.description: A region where pigeonpea is grown.

entities.name: MYANMAR
entities.description: A country from which pigeonpea is imported to India.

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The yield output of pigeonpea, which has remained stagnant at around 700 kg ha-1.

entities.name: GENETIC CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Genetic factors that limit the productivity of pigeonpea.

entities.name: MANAGEMENT CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Management-related factors that limit the productivity of pigeonpea.

entities.name: ABIOTIC CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Non-living environmental factors that limit the productivity of pigeonpea.

entities.name: BIOTIC CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Living environmental factors that limit the productivity of pigeonpea.

entities.name: YIELD GAP
entities.description: The difference between potential and actual productivity of the crop.

entities.name: GENETIC ENHANCEMENT OF GERMPLASM
entities.description: The process of improving the genetic makeup of the crop to increase productivity.

entities.name: TOLERANCE TO BIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: The ability of the crop to withstand biological stresses.

entities.name: TOLERANCE TO ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: The ability of the crop to withstand non-biological stresses.
